Job Description
PT Metrodata Electronics, Tbk (Digital Solution Provider & Technology Innovator) would like to invite you to be part of the company to develop yourself and your skills. If you are:
Bachelor's Degree Computer Science/Information Technology
2-3 years of experience in Data Modelling/Predictive Modelling and in developing machine learning.
Knows programming language (e.g. R, Python, Scala)
Passion in big data analytics.
A strong mix of mathematical/statistical and programming skills.
Solid analytical and problem-solving skills to create data-driven insights.
If you meet the requirement we needed, let’s apply for the following open positions. Metrodata not just offer for the job, we offer you for brighter career future.
Minimum Qualifications
We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our team. If you have excellent programming skills and a passion for developing applications or improving existing ones, we would like to meet you. As a Data Scientist, you’ll work closely with our engineers to ensure system consistency and improve user experience.
Data Scientist roles and responsibilities include:
Develop data science model using various machine learning platform such as Cloudera Data Science Workbench (CDSW), Google AI, Azure ML, IMB Watson, AWS Sagemaker, SAS, R, Python or others.
Follow project timeline to ensure project complete on time and on budget
Develop new product in machine learning area such as demand forecasting, product recommendation or basket analysis and other solution
Improve competencies in machine learning area

Qualification :
Minimum of 2–3 years of experience in data analytics.
Experience in Food & Beverages (F&B), retail, or startup industries is a plus.
Proficient in SQL with a strong understanding of query cost optimization.
Skilled in data visualization tools such as Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio, or Metabase.
Strong proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets for quick data analysis.
Solid understanding of key business KPIs such as GMV, margin, conversion rate, and cost efficiency.
Familiarity with dbt or basic ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) concepts is a plus.
Basic knowledge of Python or R for simple automation is a plus.

Jobdesc :
Analyze business performance across sales, operations, and marketing.
Build dashboards and visual reports to track key metrics.
Write SQL to query, clean, and join data from multiple sources.
Design and maintain efficient data models to reduce query cost.
Work with engineers to fix data issues and improve pipelines.
Share clear, actionable insights with teams and management.
Support data culture by helping non-data teams use reports correctly.

Voice Annotation Staff (Anotasi Suara) for Artificial Intelligence
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Melakukan proses anotasi, pelabelan, dan validasi data suara sesuai dengan pedoman yang telah ditentukan.
Mendengarkan rekaman audio dan menginput data secara akurat ke dalam sistem.
Mengikuti instruksi serta standar kualitas yang diberikan oleh tim supervisor.
Memastikan hasil kerja memenuhi target kuantitas dan kualitas harian.
Melaporkan kendala teknis atau ketidaksesuaian data kepada tim terkait.
Kualifikasi
Mampu mengoperasikan komputer/laptop dengan lancar (termasuk penggunaan browser, Microsoft Office/Google Docs, dan sistem berbasis web).
Memiliki kemampuan mengikuti instruksi dengan teliti dan detail.
Mampu bekerja secara disiplin, fokus, dan konsisten dalam pekerjaan yang bersifat repetitif.
Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan serta memenuhi target waktu yang ditetapkan.
Memiliki ketelitian dan konsentrasi yang baik dalam mendengarkan audio.
Bersedia bekerja sesuai jadwal yang ditentukan (kontrak 1 bulan, WFO Senin–Jumat 08.30–17.30).
Informasi Tambahan
Lokasi kerja: Menara Matahari – Karawaci
Uang saku: Rp200.000 / hari

Key Responsibilities
Lead and deliver advanced data analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning solutions to support credit analytics, risk assessment, credit scoring, and portfolio performance monitoring.
Design, develop, validate, and continuously improve predictive models related to credit behavior, default risk, fraud indicators, and data quality metrics.
Perform data exploration, experimentation, feature engineering, and model optimization using Python/R and SQL on large-scale, structured, and sensitive credit datasets.
Take full ownership of the analytical model lifecycle, including development, deployment, performance monitoring, stability tracking, recalibration, and documentation.
Ensure high standards of data quality, consistency, confidentiality, and integrity across all analytical processes.
Translate complex analytical results into clear, actionable insights through reports, dashboards, and visualizations using BI tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
Act as a strategic data partner to Risk, Product, Business, and Technology teams, supporting credit product development, risk policy formulation, and enterprise analytics initiatives.
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior data scientists and analysts.
Apply and promote best practices in data governance, data privacy, model governance, and regulatory compliance in alignment with financial services regulations.
Contribute to the continuous enhancement of data science standards, methodologies, and analytics frameworks within the organization.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, Engineering, or a related quantitative field.
Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in data science, advanced analytics, or statistical modeling, with demonstrated senior-level responsibilities.
Strong hands-on expertise in Python and/or R, SQL, and experience working with large-scale structured datasets.
Solid understanding of credit risk concepts, including credit scoring, consumer credit behavior, portfolio analytics, or alternative data, preferably within financial services, banking, fintech, or credit bureau environments.
Proven experience in developing, deploying, and monitoring analytical models in production environments.
Experience with model governance, documentation, and regulatory or audit review processes in a regulated environment.
Strong ability to communicate complex analytical insights clearly and effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Ability to work independently, take ownership of analytical outcomes, and provide sound judgment in data-driven decision-making.

We are looking for a Data Scientist / AI & Machine Learning Engineer with strong experience in building end-to-end Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions. This role will be responsible for designing scalable AI architectures, developing predictive and Generative AI models (RAG, Agentic AI), and deploying production-ready solutions on cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS.
The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with MLOps, large-scale data processing, and delivering AI solutions in real-world enterprise environments.
Job Responsibilities
Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions.
Build and maintain end-to-end ML pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, deployment, and monitoring.
Develop Generative AI applications, such as:
LLM-based chatbots
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
Agentic AI / Multi-Agent systems using LangChain and LangGraph
Design and implement cloud architectures on Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Dialogflow, etc.) and/or AWS.
Develop and optimize models for forecasting, classification, and regression use cases.
Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineers to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions.
Optimize model performance, scalability, and reliability in production environments.
Apply MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML, automation, and monitoring.
Provide technical leadership, guidance, and best practices to team members.
Job Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Data Science, or related fields (Master’s degree is a plus).
1+ years of experience as a Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, or AI Engineer.
Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in:
Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI
MLOps and automated ML pipelines
Proficiency in Python (required); experience with R, Javascript, or C++ is a plus.
Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage, etc.).
Experience with AWS is a plus.
Experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB) and relational/non-relational databases.
Proven experience developing LLM-based applications, including chatbots, RAG, and Agentic AI.
Solid understanding of cloud architecture, data engineering, and scalable systems.
Cloud and/or Machine Learning certifications (e.g., Google Cloud, Professional ML Engineer) are a strong plus.
Strong problem-solving skills, good communication abilities, and the ability to work independently or in a team.

Job Summary
We are looking for a highly analytical, agile, and detail-oriented Data Analyst to join our Livestream team. This role is crucial in transforming raw data from every live session into actionable insights that drive Gross Merchandise Value (GMV), optimize viewer engagement, and empower the production team and hosts to make data-driven decisions.

Responsibilities
Daily Performance Analysis : Monitor and analyze key metrics from livestream sessions in real-time and post-live including Traffic, Watch Time, Click Through Rate (CTR), Conversion Rate (CR), GMV, etc
Content & Product Optimization : Collaborate closely with Livestream Trainer to evaluate top-selling products, identify high-retention segments, and provide data-backed recommendations for product bundling and flash sales
Dashboard Development & Reporting : Design, build, and maintain interactive daily and weekly reporting dashboards for the operational team using advanced spreadsheets, Tableau, Power BI, or Looker
Audience Profiling : Analyze audience demographics, purchasing behavior, and interaction patterns to determine optimal broadcasting schedules (peak hours)
A/B Testing & Experimentation : Design and measure the outcomes of livestream experiments, such as testing different thumbnail designs, stream titles, or host promotional styles.
Market Research : Monitor competitor and platform livestreaming trends (TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, etc)

Requirements
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Statistics/Information Systems or a related quantitative field
Experience: 2-3 years of proven experience as Data Analyst. Background in E-commerce, Digital Marketing or an MCN (Multi-Channel Network) is a strong plus.
Highly proficient in Spreadsheets/Excel (comfortable with complex formulas, pivot tables, and large dataset manipulation).
Strong knowledge of SQL for database extraction and querying.
Hands-on experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Google Looker Studio).
Excellent communication skills; ability to translate complex quantitative data into clear, actionable terms for creative teams and hosts.
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and adapt quickly to dynamic platform trends.
Strong business acumen to understand how data metrics directly impact revenue goals.

DATA SCIENTIST CREDIT SCORING
(BERTUGAS UNTUK MELAKUKAN PENGEMBANGAN PERMODELAN MACHINE LEARNING ATAU ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENT YANG DIPERLUKAN UNTUK MENJAWAB PERMASALAH YANG INGIN DIPECAHKAN CLIENT)
Penempatan WFO di Jakarta

Persyaratan:
Berpengalaman dalam pekerjaan/proyek terkait credit scoring dan underwriting minimal 2 tahun
Advance dalam bahasa pemrograman Python/PySpark untuk permodelan machine learning
Menguasai query dalam SQL
Advance dalam teknik permodelan machine learning, artificial intelligent dan statistik (i.e classification, regression, clustering, fraud detection,credit scoring)
Pengalaman dalam teknologi big data (Spark, Hive, Impala) lebih diutamakan
Memiliki sertifikasi atau training data science professional menjadi nilai tambah

Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 All Jurusan (Statistik, Matematika, Sistem Informasi) lebih disukai
Pengalaman min. 1 tahun sebagai Admin Data Analis
Dapat mengoperasikan Ms Office (terutama rumus VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP, Pivot)
Membuat dashboard dan visualisasi data menggunakan Power BI atau tools analitik lainnya
Teliti, analitis, detail, dan mampu bekerja dengan deadline.
Mampu berkomunikasi dan berkoordinasi dengan baik

Role:
• Assist in collecting, cleaning, and organizing credit bureau data, financial data, and alternative data sources.
• Support the team in conducting basic data analysis to identify patterns, trends, and preliminary insights.
• Help create simple dashboards or visualizations using tools such as Excel, Power BI, or Python.
• Assist in documentation, reporting, and preparation of materials for internal or client presentations.
• Collaborate with the Business Consulting and Analytics teams to support ongoing projects.
• Contribute to market research and competitor insights to support product and analytics development.
• Ensure accuracy, confidentiality, and proper handling of credit bureau–related data.

Position Qualifications:
• Fresh graduate or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, or related fields.
• Basic knowledge of data analysis using Excel, SQL, Python, or visualization tools.
• Understanding of statistics, data processing, or credit/financial concepts is a plus.
• Strong analytical thinking and willingness to learn about credit risk analytics and the credit bureau industry.
• Ability to communicate findings in a clear, structured manner.
• Good communication skills in English, both written and verbal.
• Detail-oriented, proactive, and eager to support team activities.

Peluang Data Analyst
PT Internet Mulia Untuk Negeri (NEXA) sedang mencari Data Analyst yang berpengalaman dan terampil untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Semarang, Jawa Tengah. Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam menganalisis dan menginterpretasikan data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis perusahaan.
Tanggung Jawab Utama
Menganalisis data penjualan, revenue, dan performa klien
Mengembangkan dashboard performa bisnis dan reporting rutin
Melakukan market & competitor analysis
Menyusun revenue forecasting dan business projection
Mendukung pembuatan business case untuk ekspansi dan partnership
Memberikan insight strategis untuk meningkatkan pertumbuhan bisnis

Kualifikasi
Minimal S1 Statistik, Matematika, Ekonomi, Teknik, Informatika, atau bidang terkait.
Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Data Analyst dalam industri Teknologi Informasi dan Komunikasi.
Mahir dalam menggunakan alat analitik seperti SQL, Python, R, Power BI, atau Tableau.
Pemahaman yang kuat tentang teknik analisis data, visualisasi data, dan pemodelan prediktif.
Kemampuan berpikir kritis, pemecahan masalah, dan pengambilan keputusan yang baik.
Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, baik lisan maupun tertulis, untuk menyampaikan wawasan data dengan jelas.
Memahami KPI bisnis seperti CAC, LTV, conversion rate, churn

NEXA adalah perusahaan berkembang yang bergerak di bidang teknologi informasi di Kota Semarang. Sebagai One Stop Solution ICT Service Provider, NEXA menyediakan beragam layanan komprehensif untuk mendukung transformasi digital bisnis di Indonesia dengan teknologi generasi terbaru.
Produk dan solusi kami meliputi Nexa Tel, Nexa Apps, Nexa Data, Nexa Digital, dan Nexa Solution yang dirancang untuk membantu klien meningkatkan efisiensi, daya saing, dan kesiapan teknologi secara menyeluruh.
Mengapa Bergabung dengan NEXA?
Budaya kerja kolaboratif yang mengutamakan komunikasi dan saling mendukung.
Fokus pada pencapaian hasil terbaik dengan profesionalisme tinggi.
Lingkungan kerja yang positif, inspiratif, dan terbuka terhadap ide baru.
Kesempatan belajar dan pengembangan diri secara berkelanjutan.
Untuk info lebih lanjut,dapat kunjungi website kami di https://nexa.net.id/.

Job Description:
Mengumpulkan data melalui survei untuk memahami perilaku pelanggan serta kondisi pasar
Menganalisis data untuk mengembangkan strategi pemasaran dan produk
Memberikan insight berdasarkan data yang ada untuk meningkatkan kepuasan pelanggan, memperbaiki layanan, dan mendorong pertumbuhan bisnis

Kualifikasi:
Minimal S1 Statistik / Management 
Mampu menganalisa data statistik (mean, median, correlation, regression) dan menyajikannya 
Mampu menganalisa pasar & pesaing (ukuran pasar, tren, strategi pesaing)

Kualifikasi:
1. Pendidikan: Sarjana dalam bidang yang relevan, seperti Statistika, Matematika, Ilmu Komputer, atau Ekonomi.
2. Pengalaman: Pengalaman dalam analisis data, terutama dalam industri distribusi consumer goods.
3. Kemampuan Analisis: Kemampuan analisis data yang kuat, termasuk kemampuan untuk mengidentifikasi pola dan tren.
4. Kemampuan Komunikasi: Kemampuan komunikasi yang efektif untuk mempresentasikan hasil analisis kepada manajemen.
5. Kemampuan Teknis: Kemampuan menggunakan perangkat lunak analisis data, seperti Excel, SQL, Python, R, atau Tableau.
6. Bersedia bekerja dari senin - sabtu (setengah hari)
7. Penempatan Kalideres, Jakarta Barat

Keahlian:
1. Analisis Data: Keahlian dalam analisis data, termasuk kemampuan untuk mengidentifikasi pola dan tren.
2. Penggunaan Perangkat Lunak: Keahlian dalam menggunakan perangkat lunak analisis data, seperti Excel, SQL, Python, R, atau Tableau.
3. Komunikasi: Keahlian dalam komunikasi yang efektif untuk mempresentasikan hasil analisis kepada manajemen.
4. Problem-Solving: Keahlian dalam memecahkan masalah dan mengidentifikasi peluang terbaik
Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:
1. Analisis Data: Mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data penjualan,   distribusi, dan lain-lain untuk memahami tren dan pola.
2. Pengembangan Laporan: Membuat laporan yang akurat dan tepat waktu untuk membantu manajemen dalam pengambilan keputusan.
3. Identifikasi Masalah: Mengidentifikasi masalah dan peluang perbaikan dalam proses distribusi dan penjualan.
4. Rekomendasi: Memberikan rekomendasi kepada manajemen berdasarkan hasil analisis data.
5. Pengembangan Model: Mengembangkan model analisis data untuk memprediksi penjualan, distribusi, dan lain-lain.

Job Descriptions:
Perform data exploration, data cleaning, data imputation, and feature engineering on unstructured and structured data.
Design, Develop and maintain report used for daily operation, management and analytics
Build the infrastructure for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from a wide variety of data sources.
Develop and maintain all data flows and prepare all ETL processes according to business requirements and incorporate all business requirements into all design specifications
Identifying, designing and implementing internal process improvements including re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, optimizing data delivery, and automating manual processes 
Build analytics tools that utilize the data pipeline to provide actionable insights
Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability
Document all test procedures for systems and processes              
 Job Requirements:
Bachelor's degree from computer science or related fields, or equivalent software engineering experience.
Advanced SQL knowledge and experience working with relational databases, query authoring (SQL). Preferably on MS SQL
Advanced Knowledge in reporting service tools. Preferably Microsoft SSRS
Advanced Knowledge in ETL / data pipeline applications. Preferably Microsoft SSIS.
Experienced in performing root cause analysis on internal and external data and processes to answer specific business questions and identify opportunities for improvement.
Have an understanding and experience regarding the reporting dashboard and data warehouse concepts
Experienced in object-oriented/object function scripting languages: Python, Java, C#,C++, 
Proficiency in source control i.e. Git.
Got 2+ years of experience in Data Engineering role.
Familiar with Azure ETL product like Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse, Azure Datalake, Azure Devops would be a great addition.

Job Description
Develop and implement machine learning models and algorithms to solve business problems, leveraging both structured and unstructured data.
Design and build scalable and efficient data pipelines for data ingestion, preprocessing, and feature engineering.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
Conduct exploratory data analysis (EDA) to gain insights and identify patterns or trends.
Evaluate and select appropriate machine learning techniques, models, and algorithms based on project requirements.
Train, optimize, and fine-tune machine learning models using large-scale datasets.
Validate and test models for accuracy, reliability, and robustness.
Monitor and maintain deployed models, ensuring their performance and stability.
Collaborate with Data Engineers to integrate machine learning models into production systems.
Stay up to date with advancements in machine learning and actively contribute to the team's knowledge base.
Communicate findings, results, and recommendations to both technical and non-technical stakeholders or customers.

Requirements
Minimum 1 year of experience in Machine Learning and Data Science.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field (Master’s or Ph.D. is a plus).
Proven experience as a Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, or similar role, with a strong track record of deploying models in real-world applications.
Proficiency in Python, R, or Scala, and experience with popular frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn.
Solid understanding of machine learning techniques (supervised/unsupervised learning, deep learning, NLP, and reinforcement learning).
Experience with data manipulation, preprocessing, and feature engineering.
Strong knowledge of statistical analysis, hypothesis testing, and experimental design.
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and distributed computing (Hadoop, Spark).
Proficiency in SQL and database management systems.
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate complex and ambiguous business challenges.
Excellent communication and teamwork skills.

Kualifikasi:
Pendidikan minimal S1 Statistika, Matematika, Akuntasi
Pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun di posisi analis data
Mahir Excel (pivot, vlookup) dan pengolahan data
Teliti, mampu berpikir analitis, dan komunikatif
Mampu berbahasa Mandarin dan Inggris

Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Analisis Data: Mengumpulkan, dan menginterpretasikan data.
Handle data dari Manado Site
Pengembangan Laporan: Membuat laporan yang akurat dan tepat waktu untuk membantu manajemen dalam pengambilan keputusan.
Koordinasi administrasi di lapangan/area serta mengerjakan tugas tambahan dari atasan

Are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where data integrity, actionable insights, and strategic growth really matter?
PT Asuransi Raksa Pratikara is a trusted insurance company that continues to scale its digital systems. As our technology grows, so do the challenges — and that’s where you come in.
We’re looking for a Data Analyst who’s curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable bridging the gap between raw numbers and business strategy. You’ll work hands-on with SQL and visualization tools, monitor key performance metrics, uncover trends, and help strengthen our data-driven decision-making.
This role is perfect for someone who likes digging into complex datasets, solving business problems, building dashboards, and constantly learning new analytical methods. Your work will directly impact operational efficiency, risk assessment, and future business strategies.
If you enjoy hands-on data storytelling, learning fast, and turning information into real business value, you’ll fit right in.

What You’ll Do:
Interpret complex datasets to analyze key metrics (e.g., sales trends, customer behavior, or operational costs) and provide actionable recommendations.
Design, build, and maintain self-serve dashboards using BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or Looker) to democratize data access.
Write and optimize SQL queries.
Analyze historical data patterns to forecast future trends, seasonality, and the impact of business initiatives.
Validate data accuracy and consistency, working with engineering teams to resolve discrepancies in pipelines or source systems.
Identify manual reporting processes and automate them using SQL, Python, or other tools to improve efficiency.
Partner with non-technical stakeholders (Managers, Marketing, Ops) to translate business questions into data requirements..
Maintain clear documentation for data definitions, metrics logic, and reporting processes.
Communicate technical findings clearly to diverse audiences, ensuring insights lead to measurable business decisions.
What We’re Looking For:
Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field.
Minimum 1–2 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a relevant role.
Strong mastery of SQL (joins, window functions, CTEs) is mandatory.
Proven experience creating interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, Tableau, or Qlik.
Advanced proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets; basic knowledge of Python or R for data manipulation is a strong plus.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data to non-technical teams.
Specific attention to detail, a proactive problem-solving attitude, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment.

- Kepemilikan dan pemeliharaan laporan yang sudah ada di Platform BI (Tableau, Google Looker, atau Apache Superset) dan Google Sheets dengan Apps Script
- Mampu mengkonfigurasi dan mengembangkan laporan, baik yang bersifat ad hoc maupun terjadwal
- Mengembangkan dan mendukung tugas dan jadwal ETL.
- Mengkonfigurasi dan memantau level peringatan server secara proaktif setiap hari
- Mendukung performance tuning dan aktivitas data mining menggunakan ETL job Strong contribution
- Kontribusi kuat dalam desain basis data, arsitektur data, penambangan dan analisis data, keamanan dan privasi data, serta visualisasi data
- Mampu mengelola Proses Analisis/Dasbor/Laporan dari proses end to end dengan berbagai pemangku kepentingan (stakeholders)
- Bekerja secara mandiri pada tugas-tugas kompleks yang melibatkan ekstraksi data, pembersihan data, dan pengembangan solusi
Requirements:
- Pengalaman kerja 3-4 tahun di bidang terkait
- Pengetahuan mengenai SQL & Tableau adalah keharusan, disertai pemahaman yang baik tentang Python
- Pemahaman yang baik tentang scheduler tools akan menjadi nilai tambah (Airflow atau Jenkins, dll.)
- Pengetahuan mengenai tentang Microsoft Excel atau Google Sheets (fungsi dan alat, dll.)
- Pengalaman mengenai digital marketing dan analisis produk akan menjadi nilai tambah.
- Mampu menentukan prioritas dan urgensi serta menetapkan prioritas yang sesuai
- Mampu bekerja di lingkungan yang bertekanan tinggi (high pressure), sensitif waktu, dan kolaboratif
- Keterampilan komunikasi lisan dan tulisan yang baik dalam Bahasa Indonesia maupun Bahasa Inggris
- Memiliki rasa ingin tahu untuk menggali data secara mendalam guna menemukan akar permasalahan bisnis dan menyelesaikannya
- Memiliki pengalaman dalam mengelola proyek BI/Analitik yang kompleks dengan berbagai pemangku kepentingan (stakeholders).

Job description
Job Responsibilities:
Install, configure, maintain, and troubleshoot servers, storage systems, and networking hardware (e.g., routers, switches, firewalls).
Perform physical tasks such as racking, stacking, cabling, and hardware replacements.
Monitor and manage environmental controls (temperature, humidity, airflow) to ensure optimal data center performance.
Perform regular equipment inspections and preventive maintenance.
Respond to and resolve support tickets related to hardware and network issues in a timely manner.
Manage asset inventory and maintain detailed documentation of infrastructure, cabling layout, and equipment tracking.
Work closely with network and systems teams to support infrastructure upgrades, migrations, and incident resolution.
Ensure compliance with security protocols, safety standards, and company policies.
Participate in 24/7 shift rotation and on-call support schedule as required.
Collaborate with vendors and service providers for hardware support and facility-related work.


Basic Job Requirement:
Have 1 year experience
Degree in a computer-related field.
Strong communication skills, responsible, able to handle work pressure, and a team player.

Requirements:
3–7 years experience in data engineering (preferably with cloud-native data platforms).
Strong expertise in Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
Strong expertise in AWS data stack: Glue, Redshift (or Redshift Serverless), S3, IAM, Lake Formation, Lambda.
Proficiency in SQL and Python/PySpark.
Experience integrating SAP and/or ERP data sources.
Strong knowledge of API development/integration (REST, GraphQL).
Solid understanding of data modeling (3NF, Star Schema, Dimensional, Data Vault basics).
Ability to design platform standards and lightweight governance (naming conventions, catalog, quality checks).
Strong business acumen – can understand processes and convert into meaningful data solutions.

Pengembangan Data Warehouse
Mendesain dan mengembangkan model data analitik seperti fact table dan dimension table
Mengelola struktur dataset dalam Data Warehouse agar optimal untuk analisis dan pelaporan
Transformasi & Integrasi Data
Mengembangkan proses transformasi data (ELT) untuk menyiapkan data yang siap dianalisis
Mengintegrasikan data dari berbagai sumber sistem ke dalam Data Warehouse
Kualitas & Konsistensi Data
Memastikan kualitas, konsistensi, dan akurasi data yang digunakan dalam analisis dan pelaporan
Mengidentifikasi serta memperbaiki inkonsistensi atau anomali data
Kolaborasi Tim
Berkolaborasi dengan tim engineering dan stakeholder bisnis untuk memahami kebutuhan analitik
Mendukung pengembangan dataset untuk dashboard dan laporan bisnis

Kualifikasi
Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Computer Science, Data Science, Statistik, Matematika, atau bidang terkait
Pengalaman 1+ tahun dalam data analytics, data engineering, atau data warehouse
Memiliki kemampuan SQL yang kuat untuk analisis dan transformasi data
Memahami data modeling untuk analytics (star schema / dimensional modeling)
Pengalaman bekerja dengan data warehouse atau sistem analitik skala besar
Memiliki kemampuan analitis dan problem solving yang baik
Mampu bekerja secara kolaboratif dengan tim teknis maupun non-teknis

Teknologi yang Digunakan
Pengalaman dengan salah satu atau beberapa teknologi berikut menjadi nilai tambah:
SQL
Data Warehouse
Data transformation tools
Workflow orchestration
BI tools
Python untuk data processing

job_description:
Kami sedang mencari Business Analyst / System Analyst tingkat Middle hingga Senior yang kompeten untuk memimpin proses requirement gathering pada proyek pengembangan aplikasi Building Management dan Car Pooling
Kandidat terpilih akan ditempatkan setiap hari di kantor klien yang berlokasi di Tangerang, Banten, untuk menggali kebutuhan bisnis secara mendalam dan menerjemahkannya ke dalam dokumentasi teknis yang komprehensif.

About AME Group:

Company: Juara Holding Group
Position: SEO Specialist
Reporting to: Head of Digital Marketing
Employment Type: Work From Office (WFO) only
Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia

ABOUT JUARA HOLDING GROUP
Juara Holding Group is a dynamic, multi-industry holding company headquartered in Bali, Indonesia. With a growing portfolio spanning hospitality, property, lifestyle, and digital services, we operate as both an in-house digital marketing engine for our own brands and as a full-service digital agency serving external clients. We are building a high-performance team of digital professionals who are passionate about driving real growth through data-driven strategies.

ROLE OVERVIEW
We are looking for a skilled and results-driven SEO Specialist to join our Digital Marketing team on-site in Bali. In this dual-function role, you will handle SEO strategy and execution both for Juara Holding Group's internal brands and for our agency clients. You will be responsible for improving organic search visibility, driving qualified traffic, and delivering measurable ROI through white-hat SEO best practices across multiple industries.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
 SEO Strategy & Execution
Develop and implement comprehensive on-page, off-page, and technical SEO strategies for multiple brand websites and client accounts.
Conduct in-depth keyword research, competitor analysis, and search intent mapping to inform content strategy.
Perform regular SEO audits and translate findings into prioritized, actionable improvement roadmaps.
Optimize website structure, meta data, schema markup, internal linking, and page speed performance.
Content & On-Page Optimization
Collaborate with content writers to brief, review, and optimize SEO content across blogs, landing pages, and product/service pages.
Ensure all content aligns with E-E-A-T principles (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).
Implement and optimize structured data/schema markup for rich results.
Technical SEO
Identify and resolve crawlability, indexability, Core Web Vitals, and mobile-friendliness issues.
Work closely with web developers to implement technical SEO recommendations on WordPress, Webflow, and custom CMS platforms.
Monitor and manage XML sitemaps, robots.txt, canonical tags, and redirect chains.
Link Building & Off-Page SEO
Plan and execute white-hat link-building campaigns including digital PR, outreach, and strategic partnerships.
Monitor and manage backlink profiles using tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Moz.
Reporting & Analytics
Track, analyze, and report on KPIs including organic traffic, rankings, CTR, conversions, and revenue attribution.
Prepare monthly performance reports and present insights to internal stakeholders and agency clients.
Use Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, and SEO platforms to monitor performance and identify opportunities.

REQUIREMENTS
Education & Experience
 Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Information Technology, or a related field.
Minimum 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience, ideally in a digital agency or multi-brand environment.
Demonstrable track record of improving organic search rankings and driving traffic growth.
Technical Skills
Proficient in SEO tools: Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog, or equivalent.
Strong understanding of Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4 (GA4).
Working knowledge of HTML, CSS basics, and CMS platforms (WordPress, Webflow).
Familiarity with Core Web Vitals, Page Experience signals, and Lighthouse.
Understanding of local SEO strategies, especially for tourism, hospitality, or lifestyle brands (a plus for Bali-based context).
Soft Skills
Analytical mindset with strong data interpretation and problem-solving capabilities.
Excellent written communication skills in English (Bahasa Indonesia proficiency is a plus).
Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously.
Strong communication skills to present complex SEO data in clear, client-friendly language.
Team player who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative office environment.
Preferred Qualifications
 Google Analytics or Google Ads certifications.
Experience with international or multilingual SEO (EN, ID, or other languages).
Exposure to e-commerce SEO, travel/hospitality industry, or SaaS platforms.
Familiarity with AI-assisted content workflows and how to maintain SEO quality standards.
Basic understanding of paid search (SEM/PPC) for integrated campaign planning.

WHAT WE OFFER
💼  Competitive salary package
🏝️  Work in the heart of Bali
🤝  Collaborative & dynamic team culture
📈  Clear career progression path
🎓  Access to premium SEO tools & training
🌐  Exposure to multi-industry & agency clients

HOW TO APPLY
Please submit
Your latest CV/resume (PDF format)
A brief cover letter explaining your SEO experience and why do you want to join Juara Holding Group
Your latest Portfolio or links to websites you have worked on with measurable results
Any relevant certifications or tool proficiency summaries

About the Job :
As a Business System Analyst, your mission is to analyze, design, and implement business systems that improve efficiency, productivity, and overall business performance. Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities for process improvement and recommend innovative solutions. Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices to enhance system capabilities and business performance.

Demonstrate proficiency in version control using Git for effective code management.

Mengelola implementasi kepatuhan terhadap regulasi perlindungan data pribadi, termasuk Undang-Undang Perlindungan Data Pribadi, serta memastikan keselarasan penerapannya dengan kebijakan dan standar internal perusahaan.
Mengembangkan, memelihara, dan memperbarui kebijakan, standar, serta prosedur terkait Data Privacy dan Information Security guna memastikan penerapan tata kelola perlindungan data yang efektif dan berkelanjutan.
Melakukan Data Mapping dan Data Inventory, serta menyusun dan memelihara Record of Processing Activities (ROPA) agar seluruh aktivitas pemrosesan data terdokumentasi dengan baik dan siap untuk keperluan audit.
Melaksanakan Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA/DPIA) terhadap proyek, sistem, produk, kerja sama bisnis, maupun perubahan proses bisnis yang berpotensi mempengaruhi perlindungan data pribadi.
Mengintegrasikan prinsip Privacy by Design dan Privacy by Default dalam seluruh siklus hidup pengembangan sistem (System Development Life Cycle/SDLC), termasuk melakukan proses review sebelum implementasi atau go-live.
Memastikan pemenuhan hak subjek data (Data Subject Rights) serta penerapan prinsip-prinsip perlindungan data seperti data minimization, purpose limitation, dan retention limitation dalam setiap aktivitas pengolahan data.
Mengelola proses penanganan insiden kebocoran data (Data Breach Management), termasuk investigasi, pelaporan, notifikasi kepada regulator maupun subjek data, serta memastikan pelaksanaan tindakan perbaikan dan pencegahan.
Mengawal implementasi kontrol teknis perlindungan data, seperti data masking, tokenization, encryption, serta pengelolaan akses berbasis prinsip least privilege.
Mengelola proses penilaian keamanan dan perlindungan data pada pihak ketiga (third-party privacy & security assessment), termasuk vendor risk management, serta mendukung pelaksanaan audit internal maupun eksternal terkait IT Security dan Data Privacy.
Menyusun laporan risiko dan kepatuhan secara berkala kepada manajemen atau komite risiko, serta menyelenggarakan program Security & Privacy Awareness untuk meningkatkan kesadaran dan membangun budaya perlindungan data dan keamanan informasi di seluruh organisasi.

Requirements:
Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang IT, Sistem Informasi.
Pengalaman minimal 3–5 tahun di bidang Information Security / Data Privacy.
Memahami prinsip Privacy by Design dan implementasi kontrol teknis keamanan data.
Sertifikasi menjadi nilai tambah (CIPDPO / DPO Certification, CISA, CISM, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Lead Auditor)

Core Responsibilities
1. Data Pipeline Development and Management
Data engineers create and manage the pipelines that extract data from various sources, transform it into usable formats, and load it into databases or data warehouses (ETL/ELT processes). They ensure that data flows reliably from source systems to reporting and analytics platforms.
2. Data Storage and Architecture
They design and maintain scalable and secure data storage solutions, such as relational databases, NoSQL databases, and cloud-based data warehouses. They establish schemas, indexing strategies, and storage models optimized for performance and analytics.
3. Data Quality and Governance
Data engineers enforce data quality standards, implement validation and cleansing processes, and monitor pipelines to detect and resolve inconsistencies. They also ensure compliance with data governance policies and standards, including privacy regulations.
4. Performance Optimization and Scalability
Optimizing database queries, improving pipeline performance, and planning for scalable infrastructure to manage growing datasets are key responsibilities. This includes tuning systems to handle large-scale batch and real-time processing efficiently.
5. Collaboration with Stakeholders
Data engineers work closely with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand their data requirements and provide reliable datasets for analysis, reporting, and machine learning applications.
6. Tooling and Automation
They leverage tools such as Apache Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, Airflow, and cloud services like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform to automate workflows and manage large-scale data processing.

job_title: Field Service Engineer (Data Center - Power, UPS)
job_description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Field Service Engineer with a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering to join our team. This position will primarily focus on providing on-site service, maintenance, and support for critical electrical systems in data centers, including Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) systems. The ideal candidate will have strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills, along with a solid understanding of electrical systems and data center operations.

Key Responsibilities:
Perform installation, commissioning, maintenance, troubleshooting, analyzes and prepare root cause analysis report (RCA), 24X7 support of UPS systems and other critical electrical equipment within data centers.
Conduct preventive maintenance and repair tasks on UPS systems, power distribution units (PDUs), static transfer switch (STS), electrical panels, and related equipment.
Troubleshoot electrical issues, including power outages, UPS failures, and system alarms, ensuring minimal downtime.
Provide technical support for clients, answering queries and delivering solutions for electrical system issues.
Maintain accurate documentation of service activities, including work orders, reports, and service history.
Collaborate with internal teams and vendors to ensure seamless integration and operation of electrical systems in the data center.
Ensure compliance with safety regulations and company procedures while working on-site.
Perform regular inspections and testing of electrical systems to ensure they are operating at peak performance.
Assist with the training of junior engineers and technicians on electrical systems and best practices.
Monitor and track system performance and suggest improvements to enhance efficiency and reliability.

Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
Proven experience (5+ years) in field service engineering, specifically with UPS systems and data center electrical systems.
Strong knowledge of electrical systems, including UPS, Battery, STS, PDUs, transformers, and power distribution.
Ability to troubleshoot, analyzes and prepare root cause analysis report (RCA) electrical issues, read and interpret electrical schematics, and perform hands-on repairs.
Familiarity with data center operations and critical power systems.
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.
Strong communication skills and ability to interact with clients and internal teams.
Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks efficiently.
Knowledge of safety standards and procedures related to electrical systems.

Preferred Skills:
Experience with advanced UPS models and other backup power solutions.
Familiarity with data center infrastructure management (DCIM) tools.
Certifications in UPS maintenance, electrical safety, or similar fields are a plus.

Position: Mechanical Engineer
Location: Jakarta, Indonesia
Terms: Full-time
We are seeking for an experience Mechanical Engineer to join our growing team in Indonesia. The Data Center Mechanical Engineer is responsible for the design, implementation, and maintenance of mechanical systems within data center facilities. This role ensures that all mechanical systems, including HVAC, cooling, and plumbing, operate efficiently and effectively to support the critical infrastructure of the data center. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in mechanical engineering, with a focus on data center operations and energy efficiency.

Key Responsibilities:
Design and oversee the installation of mechanical systems, including heating, ventilation, air conditioning (HVAC), and cooling systems tailored for data center environments.
Conduct thermal load calculations and system sizing to ensure optimal performance and reliability of mechanical systems.
Collaborate with project managers, electrical engineers, and other stakeholders to ensure mechanical designs meet project specifications and regulatory requirements.
Monitor and troubleshoot mechanical systems during construction and operational phases, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices.
Develop and maintain documentation, including design drawings, specifications, and operation manuals for mechanical systems.
Conduct regular inspections and maintenance of mechanical systems to ensure safety, efficiency, and compliance with regulations.
Stay updated on the latest technologies and trends in mechanical engineering and data center operations to recommend improvements and innovations

Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering or a related field.
Professional Engineer (PE) license or equivalent certification is highly desirable.
At least 5 year of proven experience as an Mechanical Engineer, preferably in data center or critical infrastructure projects.
HVAC Systems – In-depth knowledge of CRAC/CRAH units, chiller plants, cooling towers, and humidity control.
Fire Suppression Systems – Familiarity with gas-based suppression systems (FM-200, Novec 1230) and integration with mechanical infrastructure.
Building Management Systems (BMS) – Ability to monitor and control mechanical systems, alarms, and fault management
Energy Efficiency Standards – Knowledge of PUE optimization, ASHRAE thermal guidelines, and sustainability practices
Proven experience as a Mechanical Engineer, preferably in data center or critical infrastructure projects.
Strong knowledge of HVAC systems, cooling technologies, and plumbing design principles.
Proficiency in engineering design software (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, or similar tools).
Familiarity with industry standards and codes (e.g., ASHRAE, NFPA) related to mechanical systems in data centers.

Responsibilities
Process Engineer
Process Design & Documentation: Develop the process flow and write the process documents according to the factory development plan. Responsible for the design and development of equipment and process fixtures and evaluating equipment capability.
Key Deliverables: Output four major documents of the production process: Process Design Specification, FMEA, SOP, Control Plan, Failure Mode, etc.
Implementation & Compliance: Ensure the smooth introduction of production and verify that the process documents are strictly implemented in all production links under controlled conditions.
Troubleshooting & Improvement: Solve various process-related problems in the production process and analyze and improve them.
Technology Advancement: Research, develop, and improve the production technology of the factory, enhancing the level of efficiency, safety, and quality assurance.
Design & Debugging: Design the technical requirements for cooling and jigs, and track their production to ensure the smooth production of products.
Support: Participate in the production line equipment and development, write the debugging and layout of the production line equipment, and ensure smooth progress of production.

IE Engineer (Industrial Engineering)
Optimization & Data Management: Carry out production line improvement and production line rhythm statistics according to the company’s continuous improvement and TPG management needs. Establish database management and work to reduce costs and improve production efficiency and quality.
Standards & Capacity: Establish product standard working hours and regularly update labor costs for capacity analysis and modification.
Anomaly Resolution: Coordinate with relevant departments to solve production anomalies, following up on the results of the measures taken.
New Product Support: Participate in the trial production of new products, formally formulate the work instruction documents required by the production line, and follow up on their implementation.
Metrics & Planning: Establish production equipment capacity and analyze data to implement improvement plans.

job_title: Embedded and SCADA Engineer — Job Description
job_description:
Tentang Perusahaan
PT Luwes Inovasi Mandiri adalah perusahaan teknologi yang berfokus pada pengembangan solusi digitalisasi industri dan sistem pemantauan real-time jarak jauh berbasis perangkat mikrokontroler cerdas serta jaringan komunikasi data digital.
Solusi inovatif yang kami kembangkan ditujukan untuk berbagai sektor strategis, seperti sumber daya air (bendungan, sungai, dan modernisasi irigasi), maritim dan pelabuhan, pertambangan, industri (pemantauan tangki dan mesin), serta infrastruktur kritikal seperti jembatan dan terowongan. Sistem yang kami bangun memungkinkan pemantauan data lapangan secara berkelanjutan, integrasi berbagai sensor industri, serta analisis data operasional melalui dashboard monitoring dan sistem otomasi kendali terpusat berbasis cloud.
Dalam menghadirkan inovasi teknologi, kami berkolaborasi erat dengan berbagai mitra bisnis dan teknologi global seperti BeanAir, Smartec, HollyKell, Erbessd, serta Universitas Indonesia (UI). Solusi presisi yang kami kembangkan telah dipercaya oleh berbagai institusi nasional dan perusahaan multinasional, di antaranya PT MRT Jakarta, Kementerian PUPR, PT Saipem Indonesia, PT Newmont Nusa Tenggara, serta CNOOC SES Ltd.Selain itu, solusi teknologi kami juga telah digunakan dalam berbagai proyek internasional, termasuk di Amerika Serikat (University of Colorado Boulder), Brunei Darussalam, dan Timor Leste.
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk mengembangkan firmware embedded berbasis STM32 serta melakukan integrasi sistem komunikasi industri dengan PLC, SCADA, MQTT, SQL, dan Node-RED. Selain itu, peran ini juga mencakup pengembangan aplikasi pendukung berbasis Android untuk kebutuhan otomasi industri dan sistem telemetry.
Kualifikasi
Pendidikan minimal S1 Elektro, Informatika, Mekatronika, Teknik Komputer, atau bidang terkait.
Pengalaman kerja minimal 3 tahun di bidang embedded system atau industrial integration.
Menguasai STM32, MQTT, SQL, Node-RED, dan Android Studio.
Memahami integrasi PLC dan SCADA.
Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.
Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik.
Tanggung Jawab
Mengembangkan firmware STM32 / ARM Cortex menggunakan C/C++ (HAL / RTOS).
Melakukan integrasi komunikasi industri seperti Modbus RTU/TCP, RS485, UART, TCP/IP, dan CAN.
Mengintegrasikan data ke SCADA, MQTT broker, SQL database, dan Node-RED.
Melakukan debugging, pengujian, dan optimasi performa perangkat.
Melakukan debugging firmware dan komunikasi perangkat.
Menyusun dokumentasi teknis serta berkolaborasi dengan tim Automation & SCADA.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim engineering dalam pengembangan sistem IoT dan telemetry.
Nilai Tambah
Memiliki pengalaman pada sistem telemetry, datalogger, atau IoT gateway.
Berpengalaman mengembangkan aplikasi pendukung menggunakan Android Studio untuk monitoring dan kontrol.
Familiar dengan lingkungan Linux / shell.
Berpengalaman dalam commissioning dan field testing.
Memiliki SIM A.
Mengapa Bergabung dengan Kami?
• Pelatihan & Sertifikasi Global
Training dan sertifikasi teknisi dari Schneider Electric.
• Kolaborasi Internasional
Bekerja bersama peneliti universitas top dunia dan partner teknologi kami di Eropa.
• Kompensasi Kompetitif
Gaji dan insentif menarik sesuai kemampuan dan pengalaman.
• Proyek Teknologi Berdampak Besar
Terlibat dalam solusi untuk sektor energi, pertambangan, pertanian, dan infrastruktur.
• Frontier Technology
Menjadi pionir dalam layanan pemantauan cuaca presisi berbasis satelit orbit rendah dan radar GNSS.

Qualifications & Skill Requirements:
1. Technical Skills:
Experience in business process analysis and system solution design.
Ability to perform basic data analysis (using advanced Excel).
Familiarity with process diagramming tools such as Microsoft Visio, Lucidchart, or Draw.io.

Results-driven Quality Assurance Engineer with strong experience in internal audit (process and product) and supplier audit is an advantage. Skilled in managing engineering changes (ECN, PCN, MCN), conducting defect analysis, and leading CAPA/PICA activities to ensure product reliability and compliance. Demonstrates solid negotiation, analytical, and problem-solving skills to enhance overall manufacturing and supplier performance while maintaining adherence to safety and company quality standards.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Perform line (process) and product audits to verify adherence to quality procedures and product specifications
Conduct supplier audits and assessments to ensure compliance with quality standards and supplier capability requirements.
Conduct and follow up on CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) and PICA (Product Improvement Corrective Action) audits to ensure effective problem resolution.
Manage and control engineering changes (ECN – Engineering Change Notice, PCN – Process Change Notice, MCN – Material Change Notice) to ensure proper documentation, validation, and implementation.
Ensure capability studies are performed on critical processes to maintain process stability and capability.

Conduct defect analysis reporting to identify root causes and implement corrective actions.
Perform MRB (Material Review Board) activities on sustained products, ensuring proper disposition and documentation of nonconforming materials.

Assist Quality Engineering in APQP (Advanced Product Quality Planning) activities and documentation.
MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS
Bachelor's degree in Technical/Engineering fields.
At least 4-5 years of working experience as a Auditor in the Aerospace or Automotive industries.
Experience in conducting quality audits to assess compliance with established standards and identify areas for improvement.  
Experience in quality assurance, with experience in quality control roles, including knowledge of measuring equipment and blueprint reading. 
Experience in Supplier Quality is an advantage, ability to manage and assess the quality of suppliers and their products, ensuring they meet the required standards.  
Experience in the machining process, especially in a shop-floor-based quality role, is highly valued.  
Ability to use statistical tools and techniques to analyze data, identify trends, and drive quality improvements.  
Good in negotiation skill and communication skills  (in Bahasa and English)
Understanding of Quality Management Systems like ISO 9001 (AS9100 is an advantage
Certifications like an Internal auditor or related to the Quality field can be beneficial.

Role Overview
We are seeking a high-caliber Senior Backend Engineer to build the core "nervous system" of our industrial data mesh, which serves as the resilient, high-availability foundation for the mesh403 platform. You will lead the development and operationalization of the Bridge-to-Backbone pattern, ensuring a seamless and reliable data flow from high-latency, push-based edge environments to high-throughput, pull-based cloud backbones. This role is essential for realizing our Federated Hybrid Constellation by designing the foundational ingestion pipelines and "Golden Path" templates that establish secure, product-to-product communication. Your architectural decisions will be critical for maintaining a common data lineage by tracking events across domains and ensuring Agentic AI is empowered with semantically consistent data. Furthermore, you will be instrumental in enforcing a strict Zero Trust security model across all mesh nodes and mitigating the "Lethal Trifecta" of systemic AI risks—untrusted data, unverified identities, and agent exfiltration.

Key Responsibilities
Bridge-to-Backbone Development: Architect and lead the full lifecycle development of the Bridge-to-Backbone ingestion pipelines that resolve the impedance mismatch between chaotic edge data and governed cloud storage.
Streaming & Distributed State Management: Implement and manage the Kafka Sidecar Bus pattern to manage distributed state and "Golden Record" events, designing for high-availability without creating brittle dependencies on core platforms.
Application Runtime & Control Flow: Utilize Dapr for advanced business logic control flows and configure Envoy proxies to intercept and route network traffic, driving asynchronous and event-driven workflows.
Specialized Ingestion Services: Develop robust, scalable ingestion services to connect data from complex, high-velocity edge environments to the Data Products in the constellation.
Onboarding & Template Design ("Golden Path"): Design and build "Golden Path" templates (e.g., Dual-Sidecar, Governance-as-Code) to accelerate the secure and compliant onboarding of Sovereign Data Products into the mesh403 network.
AI Agent Data Enablement: Design and implement the data ingestion and transformation pipelines necessary to empower Agentic AI with semantically consistent, high-fidelity data.
Critical Skill Set
Programming Mastery: Proficient in Python (FastAPI) for modular backend services, with a strong preference for practical experience in low-level languages (C++/Go) for performance-critical components.

Deskripsi Pekerjaan :
a. Mengembangkan Heat and Material Balance (HMB) menggunakan software simulasi.
b. Menyusun Process Flow Diagram (PFD) yang menggambarkan unit operasi proses.
c. Menentukan dan melakukan sizing peralatan dan instrumentasi yang akan diimplementasikan serta menerbitkan Process Data Sheet dan Package Duty Specification terkait.
d. Menyusun dan mengembangkan Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID).
e. Menyusun Cause and Effect Matrix.
f. Mengembangkan Control Narrative dan Logic Sequence untuk sistem yang menjadi tanggung jawab.
g. Melakukan perhitungan hidraulik dan termal pada sistem perpipaan, baik dalam kondisi steady state maupun transient.
h. Menentukan kebutuhan utilitas serta merancang sistem pendukungnya.
i. Menentukan kebutuhan bahan kimia dan katalis untuk sistem yang ditugaskan serta menyusun ringkasannya.
j. Menentukan jumlah dan karakteristik limbah (effluent) yang akan dibuang ke lingkungan.
k. Mendukung penyusunan Operating Manual dan prosedur Test Run.
l. Menerapkan filosofi desain kontraktual sesuai ketentuan proyek.
m. Melakukan pemeriksaan kualitas teknis atas perhitungan, simulasi, dan deliverables sesuai dengan Sistem Mutu Perusahaan.
n. Berkolaborasi dengan tim multidisiplin dalam pelaksanaan tugas engineering.
o. Berpartisipasi dalam review proyek multidisiplin, seperti Plot Plan, P&ID, HAZOP, dan Model 3D.
p. Memberikan masukan teknis untuk rencana tender, evaluasi teknis, serta presentasi terkait sistem dan peralatan proses.

Kualifikasi :
a. Lulusan Process Engineering
b. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 8 tahun pada peran serupa, dengan pengalaman proyek mencakup tahap Konseptual, Pre-FEED, FEED, hingga EPC.
c. Memahami alur kerja engineering serta keterkaitan antara deliverables dengan jalur kritis jadwal proyek.
d. Memiliki pengetahuan dan pengalaman yang baik dalam simulasi proses menggunakan software HYSYS.
e. Memiliki pengetahuan dan pengalaman dalam analisis aliran pipa baik steady state maupun transient menggunakan AFT atau Pipephase (menjadi nilai tambah)

Job Vacancy: Cost Accounting & Revenue Intelligence
Company: PT Roda Urban Nusantara (Urbanica)
Location: Pluit, North Jakarta
Employment Type: Full-Time (On-Site)
Industry: Hospitality & Entertainment (Spa, Bar, Lounge, KTV)
Company Overview
Urbanica adalah grup hospitality & entertainment yang mengelola Spa, Bar, Lounge, dan KTV dengan pendekatan experience-driven namun revenue-focused. Bagi kami, profitabilitas tidak hanya ditentukan oleh omzet, tetapi oleh bagaimana cost dikonversi menjadi pendapatan dan margin yang sehat di setiap layanan, outlet, dan aktivitas operasional.
Seiring meningkatnya kompleksitas operasional multi-outlet dan kebutuhan pengambilan keputusan berbasis data, kami mencari Financial Analyst yang mampu membaca bisnis dari cost structure, perilaku revenue, dan dinamika margin, bukan hanya dari laporan akuntansi bulanan.
Position Summary
Sebagai Cost Accounting & Revenue Intelligence, Anda berperan sebagai business analyst finansial yang menjembatani data cost dan pendapatan untuk menghasilkan insight profitabilitas yang nyata.
Peran ini menuntut kemampuan cost engineering, revenue mix analysis, dan operational P&L analysis, dengan fokus pada margin optimization, cost efficiency, dan peluang peningkatan revenue di unit Spa, Bar, dan KTV Urbanica.
Key Responsibilities
Menganalisis cost structure secara detail: cost per service, cost per hour, cost per outlet, dan cost per event, bukan sekadar total cost bulanan.
Menghubungkan data cost dengan data pendapatan untuk menghitung contribution margin per produk, layanan, channel, atau paket (bundling).
Menyusun dan mengevaluasi revenue mix analysis (pricing, bundling, upsell, peak vs off-peak) untuk menilai profitabilitas bisnis layanan.
Membaca dan menjelaskan P&L operasional serta mengidentifikasi area margin erosion, cost leakage, dan profit opportunity.
Menggunakan data historis untuk analisis tren, perbandingan antar outlet/unit, serta simulasi skenario sederhana (what-if) terkait cost & revenue.
Mengolah data mentah dari berbagai sumber (POS, laporan operasional, spreadsheet, sistem keuangan) menjadi insight yang actionable bagi manajemen.
Berkolaborasi dan berdiskusi dengan tim Operasional, Marketing, dan Manajemen untuk menjelaskan temuan analisis secara logis, terstruktur, dan berbasis angka.
Menyusun laporan analisis finansial yang berorientasi pada pengambilan keputusan bisnis, bukan hanya kepatuhan pelaporan.

Position: Critical Facilities Manager
Location: Cikarang
CBRE Data Centre Solutions (DCS) is excited to announce multiple upcoming opportunities for experienced and motivated professionals to join our growing team in Jakarta, Indonesia. As a global leader in integrated data centre management, CBRE DCS manages mission-critical infrastructure for some of the world's most prominent organisations. Our success in the Indonesia market is driving expansion, and we are growing our high-performing team with clear career progression opportunities. This is your chance to be part of a dynamic, fast-growing business with a strong brand and a commitment to excellence.
Overview:
The Critical Facilities Manager will be responsible for the overall management and performance of the on-site Data Centre Critical Environment Operations team in a business-critical 24/7/365 operating environment, providing FM services to the client. The role will also require the individual to manage and develop a professional relationship with the client locally to create a positive customer experience. The individual must deliver a performance level that achieves and beats the KPIs and SLAs set down in the contract with the client.
The role requires leadership, management, and development of the contract, ensuring financial and operational commitments are met and exceeded. The individual must ensure that all staff on this site are in compliance with CBRE ethical, financial and QHSE requirements.
Key Responsibilities:
· Provide leadership and guidance, advice, coaching, and direct support, where required to deliver best practice selection, training, assessment, recognition/reward and appraisal systems.
· Deliver effective business communication through advice, review, leadership, and direct contribution to management and team meetings, briefings, consultation forums, correspondence, publicity, monthly and ad-hoc reporting, and other publications, as appropriate.
· Create a learning environment on the site by providing the appropriate training and development planning for each member of CBRE staff. Ensure basic training needs are delivered, employees are fully competent to undertake their roles, and are able to reach their full future potential.
· Talent manage staff to ensure an appropriate training plan and career progression is identified.
· Ensure to plan the work ahead, manage the work daily on the ground, communicate the issues around the work to the key stakeholders and measure our performance at completing work on time and the performance of our staff.
· Effectively lead management-related activities including regular management meetings; development of operational procedures; fostering of good relationships with the client; providing services of the highest standards.
· Be overall responsible for the day-to-day management of the Data Centre Critical Environment Operations team within the specified sites.
· Manage annual contract budgets and accounts. Produce site-related financial, activity, and other statistical information and reports as requested. To provide input into regular management reports and Budget submissions and reviews.
· Be the point of contact during significant events or multi-discipline technical escalations occurring within the specified sites.
· As necessary, participate in any business continuity plans the team may be involved in.
· Ensure data centre operations and CBRE business policies and processes are complied with at your sites, i.e. effectively communicated, implemented and adhered to within the contract.
· Ensure the provision of healthy and safe working conditions and that both clients and CBRE health and safety policy's and process are effectively implemented across both CBRE and subcontractors activities, and are regularly reviewed.
· Build and maintain a safety conscious team culture focused on continuous improvement.
· Ensure optimum staffing structures operate across contracts, balancing cost reduction with the delivery of service excellence and equipment reliability and availability. Ensure structures support peaks and troughs in workload, and disaster recovery.
· Ensure post holders are fully competent, and that effective succession planning arrangements are in place, monitoring staff retention rates and ensuring staff training & development plans are produced and implemented.
· Ensure all absence is fully covered by suitably trained and experienced staff to ensure full 24/7 coverage.
· Ensure appropriate control systems are in place to ensure statutory, policy, and contractual commitments are met.
· Plan and schedule all maintenance subcontractors works and repairs. Ensure all accounts and documentation associated with these subcontractors are current and up to date on a monthly basis.
· Ensure all subcontractors deliver a quality and competent service and that all contractual obligations are met.
· Reach out to and liaise with global peers to ensure consistency across the accounts and compliance with client standards and best practice.
Requirements:
· Bachelor's degree in engineering, Facilities Management or a related field.
· At least 5 - 8 years of experience in critical facilities or data centres.
· Knowledge and experience in critical systems such as UPS, generators, electrical distribution systems, cooling systems, and building management systems.
· Strong leadership, English & Thai communication, and people management skills.
· Ability to manage and develop relationships with clients and subcontractors.
· Experience in managing budgets and delivering financial results.
· Knowledge of health and safety regulations and best practices.
· Ability to manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously.
· Strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.
· Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.
· Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.
· Professional certification in facilities management or related field is desirable.
Why Join Us?
· Join a high-performing team in a fast-growing digital infrastructure environment.
· Work on cutting-edge technologies and mission-critical systems.
· Be part of CBRE DCS's strong global brand and expanding presence in Indonesia.
· Enjoy competitive compensation and benefits.

Construction Manager (Data Centres)_ Jakarta
About CBRE:
CBRE is the world's leading and largest commercial real estate services and investment firm; a growing and visionary organisation, comprised of the best and brightest professionals. Within Global Workspace Solutions, also known as GWS, we are invested in the development and unique needs of our diverse employees and client accounts.
About the Role:
We are seeking experienced and results-driven Construction Manager for a 7-month contract to oversee the safe, compliant, and efficient delivery of civil and general construction works for data center developments. Based in Jakarta, you will manage all aspects of site execution, from mobilization to handover, coordinating subcontractors and stakeholders to achieve project goals on time and within budget.
What You’ll Do:
Lead and manage all sites construction activities, including earthworks, foundations, concrete, architectural, and external works.
Ensure projects adhere to commercial agreements, regulations, and industry standards.
Proactively manage HSE performance, fostering a safety-first culture.
Manage project budgets, schedules, and quality control.
Collaborate with stakeholders, including MEP contractors, to ensure integrated delivery.
Contribute to business development through identifying opportunities and offering risk-managed solutions.
Ensure compliance with Malaysian regulations, including DOSH, CIDB, UBBL, BOMBA, and DOE.
What You’ll Need:
Experience: Proven Construction Management experience (ideally 10+ years), with a preference for mission-critical or data center environments. Experience with hyperscale or large-scale data centers is a plus.
Education: Recognized qualification in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field.
HSE: Recognized HSE qualification (e.g., NEBOSH / IOSH or equivalent) and demonstrated HSE leadership.
Technical Skills: Strong understanding of construction project management, scheduling, budgeting, contract administration, and civil construction (earthworks, drainage, foundations, concrete, structural works). Knowledge of data center construction requirements, HSE management systems, risk management, and Malaysian construction compliance frameworks (DOSH, CIDB, UBBL, BOMBA, DOE).
Skills: Experience managing contractors and multi-disciplinary teams, excellent stakeholder management, communication, and the ability to manage multiple sites and priorities.
Why CBRE
When you join CBRE, you become part of the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment that helps businesses and people thrive. We are dynamic problem solvers and forward-thinking professionals who create significant impact. Our collaborative culture is built on our shared values — respect, integrity, service and excellence — and we value the diverse perspectives, backgrounds and skillsets of our people. At CBRE, you have the opportunity to chart your own course and realize your potential. We welcome all applicants.
Applicant AI Use Disclosure
We value human interaction to understand each candidate's unique experience, skills and aspirations. We do not use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to make hiring decisions, and we ask that candidates disclose any use of AI in the application and interview process.
If this sounds like a good fit, we’d love to hear from you!

Job Summary
We are seeking an experienced and highly technical MEP Manager to lead the Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) workstreams for our high-scale Data Center project in Jakarta. The ideal candidate must have a proven track record in mission-critical facilities, ensuring that complex power and cooling systems are delivered on time, within budget, and to international uptime standards.
Key Responsibilities
Project Oversight: Manage the end-to-end MEP lifecycle, from design review and procurement to installation, testing, and commissioning (T&C).
Technical Coordination: Resolve complex technical interfaces between Electrical (HV/MV/LV, UPS, Genset), Mechanical (Chiller, CRAC/CRAH), Fire Protection, and BMS/EPMS systems.
Vendor & Subcontractor Management: Lead and supervise MEP subcontractors and equipment vendors to ensure site works align with the master schedule and technical specifications.
Quality & Compliance: Ensure all MEP installations comply with Uptime Institute (Tier III/IV), TIA-942, and local Indonesian standards (SNI/PUIL).
Risk Management: Proactively identify technical risks or site constraints and implement mitigation strategies to prevent project delays.
Progress Reporting: Provide regular technical reports to the Project Director and Stakeholders regarding MEP milestones, budget utilization, and HSE compliance.
Qualifications & Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering from a reputable university.
Experience:
Minimum 8–10 years of experience in MEP project management.
At least 3–5 years of specific experience in Data Center projects (Hyperscale or Colocation).
Technical Skills:
Deep understanding of redundant power systems, precision cooling, and integrated building management systems.
Proficiency in AutoCAD, BIM (Revit), and project scheduling tools (MS Project or Primavera P6).
Soft Skills: Strong leadership, excellent negotiation skills, and the ability to work under high pressure in a fast-paced environment.
Communication: Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia (written and spoken).
Condition: Currently residing in or willing to be based in Jakarta and able to join immediately (ASAP).

Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
The Fulfillment Tech team plays a key role in enabling seamless service across multiple businesses and marketplaces in Southeast Asia. The team builds and maintains high-throughput, real-time distributed systems capable of handling hundreds of millions of requests daily, leveraging advanced machine learning technologies. Its mission is to deliver best-in-class products and experiences for driver partners to drive higher adoption and engagement. The team also focuses on improving driver partner efficiency and earning opportunities to ensure reliable order fulfillment. In addition, we work on building efficient and sustainable marketplaces by optimizing pricing strategies that benefit both partners and customers.
Get to Know the Role
We're looking for a talented and driven Software Engineer, Backend to join our growing engineering team in Jakarta, Indonesia. In this role, you'll design, develop, and maintain robust backend services that power our platform and impact millions of users. You'll work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to build scalable, efficient systems while continuously innovating and improving our technical infrastructure. This is an excellent opportunity to grow your career, mentor teammates, and make a meaningful contribution to our mission.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
You will work with the product and design team to understand requirements, provide product feedback, own and implement the product from start to finish.
You will drive and participate in technical discussions with other engineering teams.
You will write code that is reusable, scalable and testable. Make sure products are delivered on time and with high quality.
You will review code from other team members, provide constructive feedback and aim to raise the engineering bar.
You will improve the codebase. Propose and set better engineering solutions for the team.
You will be responsible and responsive during on-call duty. Debug and troubleshoot production issues.
You will provide technical guidance, mentorship and knowledge sharing to peers.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
Minimum 2 years of professional experience in backend development with a strong architecture mindset
Solid understanding of relational databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, including query optimization and data modeling
Experience in Machine Learning / AI development or implementation is highly preferred.
Hands-on experience designing and implementing scalable, distributed systems and microservices architectures
Strong knowledge of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies
Proficiency with version control systems, particularly Git
Familiarity with testing frameworks, quality assurance practices, and debugging techniques
Excellent problem-solving skills and analytical mindset with attention to detail
Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.

What We Stand For At Grab
