Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
GrabKios is the pillar of Grab's digital products business – from airtime top up, data package, bill payment, e-wallet top up, and many more. We support millions of users in multiple countries with their digital product needs. We empower hundreds of thousands of entrepreneurs to grow their digital products enterprise. And we also allow external platforms to start selling digital goods as our partners. We're always keen to grow our impact, and we're looking for individuals to join our Engineering team in Jakarta, Indonesia.
Get to Know the Role
As an Engineering Manager at Grab, you will improve strategic product and technology initiatives in financial services. You will execute the technical strategy in partnership with engineering, product, and business teams, and lead your engineering team. This role offers a chance to shape Grab's financial services direction and impact our growth in this space. Reporting to the Senior Engineer Manager, you will be based in our Jakarta Office.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
Lead a platform-focused team of backend, full-stack, and QA engineers, promoting a culture of continuous improvement.
Participate in code and technical design reviews to maintain high development standards.
Champion engineering excellence (e.g., tools, best practices, industry trends) within and beyond your immediate team.
Build and deliver quarterly/half-yearly team roadmaps, partnering with other functions across product, design, analytics, and business.
Manage daily project execution, including engineering capacity allocation and task commitments across planning cycles and sprints.
Define strategy and targets to improve system capabilities and qualities (e.g., reliability, security, and extensibility).
Work with other engineering and cross-functional leaders to solve complex interdependent projects across Grab.
Collaborate with the Operations/Support team to ensure smooth system integrations with third-party vendors.
Analyze data and reports to quantitatively evaluate and enhance platform excellence (e.g., uptime, latency, and correctness).
Grow engineering talent through mentoring, career planning, and facilitation.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
5+ years of backend development experience
3+ years of engineering management experience, showcasing leadership, mentoring, and hands-on tech solutioning
Proficiency in backend programming languages such as Go, Python, and Java
In-depth knowledge of scalable backend architecture, distributed systems, and development best practices
Experience with database design in relational databases such as MySQL or PostgreSQL
Experience deploying code in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud environments
Expertise in version control systems (e.g., Git) and CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitLab, Jenkins)
Experience with Agile methodologies and leading Agile development teams
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

job_title: Senior Software Engineer, Mobile (iOS) - Consumer Experience
job_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
Come join the Consumer Experience (CX) Engineering team! We are on an exciting mission to build the best engagement and discovery experience for our users and win customer loyalty by serving the most important needs of customers' daily lives with a seamless, personalized and contextual experience.
Get to Know the Role
You will directly report to the Engineering Manager of the Consumer Experience Growth Team. As a significant and autonomous contributor to your team, your team will trust you with designing their software systems with high quality. You will take an active role in your projects as a team member and involve yourself from design to rollout, taking ownership of your work and always focusing on moving your projects forward. This is an onsite role based in Jakarta.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
Collaborate with mobile and backend engineers, designers, data scientists, and product managers to build features.
Participate in code and design reviews to maintain our high development standards.
Brainstorm ideas, identify problems, propose and implement solutions geared towards scale and performance.
Take full ownership of projects that are built to meet functional and non-functional requirements of our users and partners.
Design, implement, instrument and deploy performant and reusable iOS components.
Lead Collaboration with partners across teams and roles, to resolve ambiguous, multi dimensional business, legal, and product needs.
Participate in interview loops to help Grab continue hiring top industry talent.
Provide technical guidance, mentorship and knowledge sharing to peers.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
4+ years of professional software development experience including at least 2 years of iOS development experience.
Fluent in Swift programming language.
Solid computer science fundamentals in algorithms and data structures.
Accountable and takes ownership of one's own work.
Experience building an end-to-end feature.
Experience running large-scale applications and global understanding of systems internals and tools like crash analytics, remote debugging and continuous integration.
Experience approaching a problem from different angles, analyzing pros and cons of different solutions, able to think about scalability and stability.
Experience in writing maintainable and testable code, including API design, unit testing, and UI testing techniques.
Understand about the CI/CD implementation.
Proficiency to converse in English both written and verbally
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

We are seeking an experienced HVAC & Thermal Cooling Field Service Engineer with a strong background in supporting data center cooling systems. This role requires hands-on expertise in installing, maintaining, and troubleshooting HVAC systems, CRAC (Computer Room Air Conditioning) units, chillers, and other thermal management solutions, specifically for data centers and high-precision environments. The ideal candidate will be skilled in optimising cooling efficiency, ensuring uptime, and resolving mechanical, electrical, and environmental issues in data center facilities.

Key Responsibilities:
Lead the installation and commissioning of HVAC and cooling systems (CRAC units, chillers, cooling towers) within data centers, ensuring proper setup, integration, and optimal performance.
Perform routine maintenance, calibrations, and repairs on HVAC systems. Troubleshoot mechanical, electrical, and refrigerant issues, resolving them quickly to minimize downtime.
Monitor system performance, analyze data for inefficiencies, and implement corrective measures to enhance energy efficiency, reduce costs, and maintain optimal thermal conditions.

Respond promptly to emergency breakdowns, prioritize repairs, and restore cooling systems swiftly to minimize disruptions to critical data center operations.

Skills:
In-depth knowledge of HVAC systems, electrical systems, and mechanical troubleshooting techniques.
Proficient in the use of diagnostic tools and software for HVAC systems, including temperature sensors, airflow meters, and building management systems (BMS).
Excellent communication skills with the ability to interact professionally with clients, vendors, and cross-functional teams.
Strong attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and the ability to manage time effectively.

Qualifications:
Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, HVAC Technology, or related field (preferred). Certifications or vocational training in HVAC or relevant technical areas are highly desirable.
Minimum of 5 years of experience in HVAC field services, with a focus on data centers or high-performance environments.
Hands-on experience with CRAC units, chillers, thermal management systems, and cooling towers.
Familiarity with data center infrastructure and operational requirements, including thermal load management and energy efficiency best practices.

Experience:
Minimum 10+ years in construction project management.
At least 5 years specifically managing Data Center projects (Hyperscale, Colocation, or Tier III/IV facilities).
Technical Skills:
Proven expertise in managing integrated Civil, Structural, and MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) workstreams.

Proficiency in Primavera P6, MS Project, and BIM environments.
Soft Skills: Exceptional leadership, stakeholder management, and crisis-resolution skills.
Language: Native fluency in Bahasa Indonesia and professional proficiency in English (written & spoken).
Requirement: Currently residing in Jakarta and able to start immediately or with a very short notice period.
Responsibilities

Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary point of contact for clients, consultants, government authorities, and internal executives.
Schedule & Budget Control: Monitor project milestones using Primavera P6/MS Project, manage P&L, and implement cost-control measures to prevent overruns.
Quality & Safety Oversight: Enforce strict QA/QC protocols and HSE standards, ensuring zero-accident targets in a high-risk construction environment.
Risk Mitigation: Identify potential bottlenecks in the supply chain or site execution and develop proactive recovery plans.
Contract Management: Oversee subcontractors and vendors, ensuring all contractual obligations are met and managing any change orders effectively.
Commissioning Coordination: Lead the transition from construction to the Integrated Systems Test (IST) and final handover to the operations team.

Jobdesk :

Monitor and report improvement progress to supervisors or managers.
Support audit readiness and documentation needs.
Help create awareness and training about continuous improvement.

Candidate must possess at least Banchelor’s Degree in Industrial Engineering, IT, Information System, or equivalent with min. GPA 3.00;
Familiarity with 5S, FSMS, QMS, HSE, Halal assurance system, and Kaizen is a plus; Proficiency in data analysis tools such as Microsoft Office, Power BI, Autocat, and other relevant software.
Willing to join soon and be placed in Waru, Sidoarjo - Jawa Timur.

    Job Description
We are looking for a Senior Business Analyst to join our Technology Standards and Program Management team. In this role, you will be a critical part of ensuring our IT landscape is compliant, efficient, and strategically aligned. You will take the lead on a range of activities, from shaping our technology governance to managing our IT portfolio and optimizing our cloud spending. This role requires a proactive and experienced professional who can translate complex requirements into actionable policies and drive their adoption across the organization.
  What You'll Do:
Compliance & Policy Development: Serve as a subject matter expert for compliance readiness and preparation. You will be responsible for creating, updating, and socializing IT policies, standards, and guidelines that align with industry best practices and regulatory requirements.
FinOps & Cost Management: Own and drive FinOps initiatives to manage and optimize our cloud spending. You will analyze cloud usage data, identify areas of waste, and work with engineering teams to implement cost-saving measures without compromising performance or reliability.
IT Portfolio Management: Manage and maintain our IT portfolio, ensuring it is accurately documented and aligned with our strategic goals. You will track the health of key technology assets, support the governance process for new technology adoptions, and report on the overall portfolio to leadership.
Stakeholder Engagement: Collaborate with a wide range of stakeholders, including engineering teams, finance, security, and legal, to gather requirements, build consensus, and drive the adoption of our standards and programs.
Program Support: Provide business analysis support for a variety of technology programs, including documenting requirements, defining success metrics, and monitoring program progress.
  Requirements
What We're Looking For:
Experience: A minimum of 3 years of experience as a Business Analyst, specifically in a technology-focused environment.
Policy & Governance: Proven experience in crafting, implementing, and managing IT policies, standards, or guidelines.
Compliance Knowledge: A solid understanding of compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS) and the ability to translate their requirements into practical business processes.
Financial Acumen: Experience with FinOps or cloud cost management principles. You should be comfortable working with financial data to drive business decisions.
IT Portfolio Management: Familiarity with IT portfolio management concepts and a proven ability to manage and report on technology assets.
Analytical Skills: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to gather, analyze, and synthesize complex information from multiple sources.
Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present complex topics clearly and concisely to diverse audiences.
Proactive Mindset: A self-starter who can take initiative, operate with minimal supervision, and drive projects from conception to completion.
  Nice to Haves (Not Required, but a Plus):
Certification in Business Analysis (e.g., CBAP, CCBA).
Experience with a specific cloud provider's FinOps tools (e.g., AWS Cost Explorer, GCP Cost Management).
Familiarity with project management methodologies (e.g., Agile, Scrum)
  If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

Qualification:
Bachelor's degree in Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain Management, Business, or a related field.
Several years of experience in production planning, inventory control, or a related field. Experience in the glass industry is preferred.
Proficiency in using PPIC software and Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems. Advanced knowledge of inventory management principles and production planning techniques.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to optimize production and inventory processes.
Effective communication skills to collaborate with different departments, suppliers, and customers.
Attention to detail to manage complex production schedules and inventory levels accurately.
